name: Attio
description: Monitor Attio CRM for team member access and workspace data compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Attio at https://app.attio.com
2. Go to Workspace Settings → Developers → API Keys
3. Create a new API key with read access
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Attio Workspace Settings → Developers → API Keys

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Attio workspace members and their CRM access permissions

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Audits Attio workspace member roles for access review compliance
